word: G1273 - διανυκτερεύω - dianyktereúō - dee-an-ook-ter-yoo'-o - Continue all night

sections.paragraph:
- Original: διανυκτερεύω

- Transliteration: Dianuktereuo

- Phonetic: dee-an-ook-ter-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to spend the night, to pass the whole night

- Origin: from G1223 and a derivative of G3571

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1223 and a derivative of G3571; to sit up the whole night: - continue all night.
